Who

About Shahidur Rahman

A motivated professional with experience in sales, marketing, and customer support across BPO and healthcare sectors. Skilled in digital marketing and AI tools, with a proven ability to drive business growth and deliver excellent customer satisfaction.

Background spans multiple industries — from managing inbound calls for Papa John's US-based customers at Tech Point BPO to driving targeted marketing campaigns at Medihop Health Care Limited. A constant drive for growth and a knack for communication are the core threads through every role.

Beyond the professional world — travel, nature photography, digital art, and exploring cutting-edge AI tools reflect the creative and curious side of Shahidur Rahman.
